scripts.build: pnpm gen:special-keys-docs && pnpm --filter @aura/db build && pnpm --filter aura-api build && pnpm --filter aura-dashboard build && pnpm --filter aurahq-web build
scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @aura/db build && pnpm --filter aura-api --filter aura-dashboard --parallel dev
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter aura-api typecheck && pnpm --filter aura-dashboard typecheck
